scores.rationale: Misidentifies existing quotes and data but correctly identifies structural weaknesses and suggests concrete improvements like adding citations and clarifying technical details.
Relies on abstract pedagogical jargon and generic style tips without referencing the essay’s actual content or addressing its factual and structural flaws.
Offers scattered, off-topic suggestions (e.g., moon colonization, exoplanets) that diverge from the essay’s focus on Venus and lacks concrete guidance tied to the provided text.
